location.origin: Seattle, Washington. Rocky Votolato based in Seattle. The acoustic context strips the punk-folk energy of early records to bare folk.
location.formative: Seattle. Votolato's acoustic work draws from solo recordings and stripped-down performances. Voice and guitar. Sometimes piano. The songs that survived the stripping.
location.career: Rocky Votolato (acoustic): the third appearance of a returning artist. Originally at degree 46 (confessional drifter, punk-folk energy, E=2). Returns at degree 85 (acoustic stripping, bare folk, E=3). The THIRD artist to appear twice with different contextual framings (after Death Cab 58/82, Jurado 45/84). E=3 -- energy INCREASE on return.

members.name: Rocky Votolato
members.note: In acoustic context, Votolato is solo or minimal accompaniment -- voice and guitar, sometimes piano. The punk-folk armor stripped away. The confession delivered without armor.

associated_musicians.name: Rocky Votolato (original)
associated_musicians.note: Folk at E=2. The confessional. The confessional drifter. Punk-folk energy. Degree 85 is 39 degrees later -- acoustic stripping, energy increase, confession without armor.

associated_musicians.name: Damien Jurado
associated_musicians.note: Both return artists with 39-degree arcs. Both folk. Jurado deepened (same E=2). Votolato stripped (E=2 to E=3). Different transformations.

associated_musicians.name: Death Cab for Cutie
associated_musicians.note: First return artist. Genre shifted (Indie Rock to Indie Folk). Three return artists now: Death Cab (58/82), Jurado (45/84), Votolato (46/85).

associated_musicians.name: Pedro the Lion
associated_musicians.note: Both in the folk zone (46, 47). Both confessional singer-songwriters. Pedro's theological confession and Votolato's drifter confession.

associated_musicians.name: Sam Beam
associated_musicians.note: Both acoustic folk. Beam at E=2, Votolato acoustic at E=3. Beam's warmth and Votolato's stripped directness.

theory_nodes.concept: The stripped confession (eighty-sixth acoustic element -- punk-folk artist removes the punk, folk remains, confession gets louder; E=2 to E=3; stripping produces projection not silence; voice more exposed, guitar more naked, dynamic range paradoxically increases)
examples: Rocky Votolato acoustic (degree 85) -- voice and guitar. The punk-folk energy shed. Confession stands alone.
Rocky Votolato original (degree 46) -- the confessional drifter. Punk-folk energy with raw emotional directness. 39 degrees later, the punk is stripped, the confession remains.
Contrast with the late whisper (degree 84, Jurado) -- Jurado's stripping produces silence. Votolato's stripping produces projection. Both acoustic. Different destinations.
Energy increase: E=2 (46) to E=3 (85). The paradox of acoustic stripping -- removing layers reveals more dynamic range.
theory_nodes.description: The stripped confession is the eighty-sixth acoustic element. Punk-folk artist removes the punk, folk remains, confession gets louder. Stripping produces projection.

ancestors: The late whisper (degree 84, Jurado) -- stripping to silence. The stripped confession is stripping to projection.
The confessional (degree 46, Votolato) -- the stripped confession is what the confessional becomes when the armor is removed.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-six acoustic elements across eighty-five degrees. The stripped confession follows the late whisper -- from silence to projection. Track element 87 at degree 86.

theory_nodes.concept: The confessional return (eighty-sixth artist-city pattern -- confessional artist returns in context that makes confession more direct; degree 46 and degree 85, 39 degrees apart; same span as Jurado 45-84; the drifter stops drifting)
examples: Rocky Votolato (degree 46 original, degree 85 acoustic) -- 39 degrees apart. Confessional drifter to acoustic confessional.
Same 39-degree span as Jurado (45 to 84). Two artists, two arcs, same span. Coincidence or engine resonance.
Contrast with Death Cab's return (58/82) -- 24 degrees. And Jurado's return (45/84) -- 39 degrees. Votolato (46/85) -- also 39 degrees.
theory_nodes.description: The confessional return is the eighty-sixth artist-city pattern. Confessional artist returns in context that makes confession more direct. 39 degrees apart.

ancestors: The artist arc (degree 84, Jurado) -- temporal depth. The confessional return is temporal clarification.
The recursive return (degree 82, Death Cab) -- multi-context depth. The confessional return is confessional intensification.
genealogy.relationship: Eighty-six artist-city patterns across eighty-five degrees. Track pattern 87 at degree 86.

theory_nodes.concept: Third return artist -- Rocky Votolato (46/85) is the THIRD artist to appear twice with different contextual framings, after Death Cab (58/82) and Damien Jurado (45/84); energy INCREASES on return (E=2 to E=3)
examples: Rocky Votolato (46/85) -- THIRD return artist. Energy increases. Acoustic stripping.
Death Cab for Cutie (58/82) -- FIRST return artist. Genre shifted (Indie Rock to Indie Folk). Energy decreased (E=4 to E=2).
Damien Jurado (45/84) -- SECOND return artist. Genre deepened. Energy constant (E=2).
Three return patterns: genre shift, genre depth, energy increase. Three ways an artist transforms on return.
theory_nodes.description: Third return artist at degree 85. Votolato returns 39 degrees after first appearance. Energy increases. Three return artists total.

genealogy.relationship: Three return artists by degree 85. Track future returns.

theory_nodes.concept: Folk at Genre Stage 67 -- same genre as degree 46; three consecutive folk returns (82, 84, 85); the folk-return zone; acoustic stripping reveals the songs underneath
examples: Rocky Votolato acoustic (degree 85) -- Folk. Genre Stage 67. Same genre as degree 46.
Three consecutive folk returns: Death Cab acoustic (82), Jurado late (84), Votolato acoustic (85). The folk-return zone.
Each return strips differently: Death Cab strips genre, Jurado strips production, Votolato strips punk energy.
theory_nodes.description: Folk at Genre Stage 67. Same genre as degree 46. Three consecutive folk returns. The folk-return zone.

ancestors: Folk at degree 84 (Jurado late). Genre Stage 66. Now 67.
Folk at degree 46 (Votolato original). Same genre, acoustic stripping.
genealogy.relationship: Genre Stage 67 at degree 85. Track genre at degree 86.

theory_nodes.concept: E=3 at degree 85 -- energy increase from E=2 at degree 46; rare energy increase on return; stripping produces projection not silence; the paradox of acoustic stripping
examples: Rocky Votolato acoustic (degree 85) -- E=3. Up from E=2 at degree 46.
Three return energy patterns: Death Cab E=4 to E=2 (decrease), Jurado E=2 to E=2 (constant), Votolato E=2 to E=3 (increase).
The paradox: removing layers produces more dynamic range. The voice is louder without the band.
theory_nodes.description: E=3 at degree 85. Energy increase from E=2 at degree 46. Rare energy increase on return. Stripping produces projection.

ancestors: E=2 at degree 84 (Jurado). Rises to E=3.
E=2 at degree 46 (Votolato original). Same artist, energy increases.

theory_nodes.concept: Three return patterns -- Death Cab: genre shift (Indie Rock to Indie Folk); Jurado: genre depth (Folk deepened); Votolato: energy increase (E=2 to E=3); three returns, three transformations
examples: Death Cab (58/82) -- genre shift. Indie Rock to Indie Folk.
Jurado (45/84) -- genre depth. Folk to deeper Folk. Same E=2.
Votolato (46/85) -- energy increase. Folk to Folk. E=2 to E=3.
Three different transformations reveal three things about what return means.
theory_nodes.description: Three return patterns by degree 85. Genre shift, genre depth, energy increase. Three transformations.

ancestors: First return artist (degree 82). The pattern set began.
genealogy.relationship: Three return patterns documented. Track future returns for new pattern types.

cross_references.relationship: Original entry. Folk at E=2. The confessional. The confessional drifter. Punk-folk energy. Degree 85 is the same artist 39 degrees later -- acoustic stripping, energy increase (E=2 to E=3), confession without armor. The drifter stops drifting.

Recurring pattern. Jurado returns at 84 (late career). Votolato returns at 85 (acoustic). Both 39-degree arcs. Both folk. Different transformations: Jurado deepened (same E=2), Votolato stripped (E=2 to E=3).
Recurring pattern. Death Cab returns at 82. First return artist. Genre shifted (Indie Rock to Indie Folk). Three return artists now: Death Cab (58/82), Jurado (45/84), Votolato (46/85).
Folk zone. Both in the folk zone (46, 47). Both confessional singer-songwriters. Pedro's theological confession and Votolato's drifter confession -- two kinds of truth-telling.
Quiet folk. Both acoustic folk. Beam at E=2, Votolato acoustic at E=3. Beam's warmth and Votolato's stripped directness -- two approaches to acoustic folk, one warm, one raw.
